ab: margi mumu, sesa ka nemɨcɨ mamua singsi mua cɨkɨcɨkɨle kububuru marudrɨnge.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: margi! teldrekane ma kname musobaka ku marudrenge.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說茂林魯凱語。
en: B: Yes! We’re going to speak Maureen Rukai to the seniors.
A: Are we almost there?
B:Almost there.
A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: aii! Urgu mumu Teldrekane! matkadre ngé ka yulane.
ch: A:你們會說茂林魯凱語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: (sighs) You guys speak Maureen Rukai! That’s great!

ab: margi mumu sesa ka singsi numɨcɨ ma mwa, mua tɨbɨcɨnga tomuma.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.
B: Yes, sir.

ab: mukunia ngurubua idilipi, ngulringava emɨcɨ ku maka sakiké nga.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: iyo, singsi. angculu kname mra ku maka saki kénga.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.
A: Are we there yet?
B: Not yet, it’s still far away.
A: You go watering.
B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: mua mra ku sibisibisi na rarame.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: iyo, nuuwa ma kɨkɨ bisi rarame.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: margi mumu, sesa ka nuwa ma miti ku tékikadra makagulugu lénga.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?
A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: mungurubua na idilipi, nolengémanga miti na kipu.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.
B: Yes.

ab: tulucubunga ka makararamenga, kodrenga ka maka susuranga, mungikmania mua cngcngle.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.
B: I’m afraid of snakes.
A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: icizikang midranga ka nusarbu ma miti musivilria.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.
B: Yes, thank you.
A: What did you see today?

ab: ucngle kɨkɨ madro na sura, si ikéla madro na rarame.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.
A: Hurry up, we have to go.
B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.
A: Shall we go swimming together?
B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: kené iké madro na ico iké lunglungé
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: sakura téburo kedro na acɨlé, iké ta kené lunglungé ka margi.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
